data.name: checkBoxCheckForUpdates
data.value: Look yonder for updates upon starting

data.name: checkBoxCheckForUpdates_ToolTip_Part
data.value: Queries the following address when starting the app:

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInFolderConvertToJpg_ToolTip
data.value: Converts cover art unto JPG with compression of 90 (excellent trade betwixt size and quality).

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInFolderResize_ToolTip
data.value: Resizes cover art unto specified max width/height.

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInTagsConvertToJpg_ToolTip
data.value: Converts cover art unto JPG with compression of 90 (excellent trade betwixt size and quality).

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInTagsResize_ToolTip
data.value: Resizes cover art unto specified max width/height.

data.name: checkBoxCreatePlaylist_ToolTip
data.value: Creates an album playlist file for each downloaded album.

data.name: checkBoxM3uExtended_ToolTip
data.value: M3U playlists in extended format (directives prefaced by the # character).

data.name: checkBoxModifyTags_ToolTip
data.value:
Modifies each tag as specified below.
If not, all tags art unchanged, equivalent to setting "Do not modify" for each tag.

data.name: checkBoxRetrieveFilesSize
data.value: Retrieve file size before downloading tracks

data.name: checkBoxRetrieveFilesSize_ToolTip
data.value: Retrieves file size to show precise progress. If not, some bandwidth/time shalt be saved.

data.name: checkBoxSaveCoverArtInFolder_ToolTip
data.value: Downloads cover art unto the album folder.

data.name: checkBoxSaveCoverArtInTags_ToolTip
data.value: Saves cover art in the track tags.

data.name: checkBoxVerboseLog_ToolTip
data.value: Shows more info in the log.

data.name: labelAdvancedSettingsWarning
data.value: Change these settings at thine own risk.

data.name: labelSettingsInfo
data.value: Some settings cannot be changed whilst tracks art downloading.

data.name: messageBoxCheckForUpdatesError
data.value: An error occurred whilst checking for updates. Pray retry later.

data.name: messageBoxCloseWindowWhenDownloadingText
data.value: There art currently active downloads. Art thou sure thou wishest to close the application and stop all downloads?

data.name: messageBoxCouldNotOpenUrlError
data.value: Couldst not open the following link: {0}

data.name: messageBoxNoUpdateAvailable
data.value: Thou already hast the latest version ({0}).

data.name: messageBoxResetSettingsText
data.value: Reset all settings unto their default values? This action cannotst be reverted.

data.name: messageBoxUnhandledException
textBoxAllowedFileSizeDifference_ToolTip
data.value:
When downloading a track, if the same file (name) already exists, it shall be checked against the track to download. If the size of both files differ from less than this value (in percent), the track download shalt be skipped. Set this value unto 0 in order to always download tracks, even if already existing on disk.
Recommended value = 5

data.name: textBoxCoverArtFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Thou canst use placeholders to customize the file name: - {artist} shall be replaced by the album artist - {album} shall be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} shall be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxDownloadMaxTries_ToolTip
data.value:
Maximum number of tries performed to download a track if it fails. After that number is reached (for each track), the track download shalt be skipped.
Recommended value = 7

data.name: textBoxDownloadRetryCooldown_ToolTip
data.value:
Used to control the exponential back-off mechanism. After each failure of a track download, BandcampDownloader canst wait for a specific time before trying again to download the track in order to avoid tickling the Bandcamp anti-spam filter. The formula used to compute the time to wait before trying again a download is the following: time = cooldown * (exponent ^ attempt-count)
Recommended value = 0.2

data.name: textBoxDownloadRetryExponent_ToolTip
data.value:
Used to control the exponential back-off mechanism. After each failure of a track download, BandcampDownloader canst wait for a specific time before trying again to download the track in order to avoid tickling the Bandcamp anti-spam filter. The formula used to compute the time to wait before trying again a download is the following: time = cooldown * (exponent ^ attempt-count)
Recommended value = 4

data.name: textBoxDownloadsPath_ToolTip
data.value: Thou canst use placeholders to customize the download folder depending on the album: - {artist} shall be replaced by the album artist - {album} shall be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} shall be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Thou canst use placeholders to customize the file name: - {artist} shall be replaced by the album artist - {title} shall be replaced by the track name - {tracknum} shall be replaced by the track number - {album} shall be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} shall be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxPlaylistFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Thou canst use placeholders to customize the file name: - {artist} shall be replaced by the album artist - {album} shall be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} shall be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxUrlsPlaceholder
data.value:
Paste URLs of albums to download hither. Thou canst specify multiple URLs by writing one URL per line.
A Bandcamp URL looketh like: http://[artist].bandcamp.com/album/[album] or http://[artist].bandcamp.com/track/[track] Paste artist pages: http://[artist].bandcamp.com and check "☑ Download artist discography" to download all their albums.

data.name: textBoxMaxConcurrentAlbumsDownloads_ToolTip
data.value: The maximum number of albums that canst be downloaded simultaneously

data.name: textBoxMaxConcurrentTracksDownloads_ToolTip
data.value: The maximum number of tracks (within the same album) that canst be downloaded simultaneously

data.name: checkBoxContinueOnError_ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the downloader shall continue with the next album or track when an error occurs instead of stopping the entire download.

data.name: checkBoxWaitForFileAfterDownload
data.value: _Wait for file to be ready before tagging

data.name: checkBoxWaitForFileAfterDownload_ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, waits for the downloaded file to be fully written to disk before attempting to add tags. Helps prevent file-not-found errors.

data.name: checkBoxSplitVariousArtistsTrackTitles_ToolTip
data.value: For Various Artists releases, automatically splits track titles in the format "Artist Name - Track Name" into separate Artist and Title tags.

data.name: checkBoxIgnoreTracksLongerThan_ToolTip
data.value: Skips downloading tracks that exceed the specified duration in minutes.

data.name: checkBoxAssignAlbumArtistToAllTracks_ToolTip
data.value: Sets the album artist as the track artist for all tracks, useful for compilations or V/A releases.

data.name: checkBoxShowTrackCountText_ToolTip
data.value: Displays the number of tracks downloaded thus far in the action bar.

data.name: forceBitrateDialogText
data.value:
This feature is experimental. Bitrate conversion mayst not work correctly on all systems and couldst produce unexpected results.
Art thou sure thou wishest to enable this feature?

data.name: checkBoxForceBitrate_ToolTip
data.value: Converts downloaded tracks unto the specified bitrate. Useful for reducing file size.

data.name: checkBoxShowOriginalDownloadSize_ToolTip
data.value: Displays the original download size in brackets alongside the converted size.

data.name: checkBoxEnableToastNotifications_ToolTip
data.value: Shows Windows toast notifications for download events.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnDownloadComplete_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when all downloads art finished.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnDownloadError_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when a download fails.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnAlbumComplete_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when each individual album finishes downloading.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnTrackSkipped_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when a track is skipped (e.g., due to duration limit).

data.name: checkBoxShowDetailedErrorDialog_ToolTip
data.value: Shows detailed error information in error dialogs instead of generic messages.
